home.heroTitle: Support for whanau of preterm twins
home.heroSubtitle: Private. Culturally safe. Built for Aotearoa.
home.heroDescription: A sovereign, privacy-first platform connecting whanau of preterm twins with services, information, and each other - across Aotearoa New Zealand.
home.intro: A sovereign platform to help families navigate support, services, and information with dignity and care.

roleSelector.title: Nau mai, haere mai - Welcome
roleSelector.subtitle: Supporting whanau of preterm twins across Aotearoa New Zealand
roleSelector.parentDescription: Get support, information, and guidance for your journey
roleSelector.practitionerDescription: Access tools, resources, and directory management

features.title: Built for whanau, by whanau
features.subtitle: Every feature designed with cultural safety and privacy at its heart.
features.privacyDescription: Your data never leaves Aotearoa. End-to-end encrypted and under your control.
features.directoryDescription: Find services, support groups, and specialists across all regions of Aotearoa.
features.culturalDescription: Designed with and for Maori whanau. Te Tiriti o Waitangi-aligned practices throughout.
features.supportDescription: Connect with other whanau who understand the journey of premature twins.
features.guidesDescription: Curated information in plain language, reviewed by clinicians and whanau.
features.aiDescription: A gentle AI guide to help navigate information - always transparent, never a replacement for your care team.

values.title: What we stand for
values.subtitle: Our kaupapa guides every decision we make.
values.manaDescription: Upholding the sovereignty and self-determination of whanau in every interaction.
values.whanauDescription: The whole whanau is supported - not just the patient. Siblings, partners, grandparents included.
values.tikaDescription: Honest, accurate, and culturally appropriate information - always.
values.manaakiDescription: Genuine care and hospitality in every feature, every word, every interaction.
